description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the ubuntu:xenial Docker image and defines two job types: test and tag. Add a job named unittests that runs in the test type and executes the following shell commands: apt-get update, apt-get -y install python3-pip libarchive-dev, pip3 install -r requirements.txt, and python3 -m unittest discover -s tests.api. No caches, artifacts, or special rules are defined.
